title: Ripartia repens
taxonomy: Ripartia repens is a species within the family Hesperiidae, commonly known as the skippers. It belongs to the subfamily Pyrginae, which is a group of small to medium-sized butterflies. The genus Ripartia is part of the tribe Pyrgini, consisting of several species found in various parts of the world. The classification of Ripartia repens places it within the order Lepidoptera, which includes butterflies and moths. This classification highlights its relationship to other members of the Lepidoptera order and its specific place within the Hesperiidae family.
